label: Capacitor (Electrolytic)
description: Polarized electrolytic capacitor. Stripe side is negative (–).

over_voltage.message: Electrolytic capacitor voltage rating exceeded. These can rupture violently when over-volted. Use a cap rated for higher voltage.

reverse_polarity.message: Electrolytic capacitor connected backwards. The stripe side (–) must connect toward ground, the plain side (+) toward positive voltage.
